Table of Contents

Interface ITransformation3D

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control a 3D affine transformation.

[Guid("C06E0427-90D2-11D3-9F5C-00C04F6BC5F4")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITransformation3D

Methods

PostMultiply(ITransformation3D) 

void PostMultiply(ITransformation3D postTransform)

Parameters

postTransform ITransformation3D

PreMultiply(ITransformation3D) 

void PreMultiply(ITransformation3D preTransform)

Parameters

preTransform ITransformation3D

Reset()

Resets the transformation to unit matrix.

void Reset()

void Rotate(double rotationAngle, IVector3D rotationAxis)

Parameters

rotationAngle double
rotationAxis IVector3D

Scale(double, double, double)

Adds a scaling factor to the transformation matrix.

void Scale(double sx, double sy, double sz)

sx double
sy double
sz double

Examples

void Transform(int numPoints, ref WKSPointZ originalPoints, out WKSPointZ transformedPoints)
